docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SHEY, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-03-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR A FURTHER HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27465, RECORD TRANSFERRED
VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFT; NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEY, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES $1,670.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.46 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,708.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEY, JACQUELINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27465 ON 3/25/04 NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALLS CLAIMD DIVISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
